kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": { "width": 1280, "height": 720 } }

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com

test.name: TC_001 Connexion Avec Utilisateur Performance Glitch

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="username"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'performance_glitch_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-test="login-button"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="inventory-list"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

test.name: TC_005 Validation Des Champs Obligatoires Lors Du Checkout

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="username"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'standard_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-test="login-button"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="inventory-list"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And Add First Product To Cart
Click First Add To Cart Button
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: See also file:///C:/Users/Landing/Desktop/docDev/robotClaude/front-back/rf_tests/suite_runs/suite_S1781436279659_2/playwright-log.txt for additional details.

test.name: TC_006 Deconnexion Via Le Menu Lateral

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="username"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'standard_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-test="login-button"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="inventory-list"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=react-burger-menu-btn at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=react-burger-menu-btn'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=logout_sidebar_link at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=logout_sidebar_link'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="login-button"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.msg: ${url} = https://www.saucedemo.com/
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
